name: T&S Washington
text:
We had an excellent stay at the Ayres Hotel in Chino. Every staff member we encountered was genuinely friendly, and you can tell they take real pride in their work. Our room was spotless, and all the amenities—from the fitness center to the pool area to the dining room—were clean, well‑maintained, and inviting.

From the front desk team to housekeeping, from the cooks to the dining room staff, everyone was professional, warm, and attentive. That level of consistency is what makes me trust staying here. The breakfast was great, and that homemade salsa… listen, that alone says a lot! I almost don’t want to leave this review because I’d love to keep this gem to myself.

The location is also a big plus—close to the airport, near a nice shopping plaza, and within walking distance of great restaurants like BJ’s and Lucille’s. We’re already looking forward to our next stay.

Always impressed with the Ayres Hotel brand. They clearly treat their employees well, and it shows in the quality of service and the overall experience.
textTranslated:
Kami menikmati pengalaman menginap yang luar biasa di Hotel Ayres di Chino. Setiap anggota staf yang kami temui sangat ramah, dan Anda dapat melihat bahwa mereka benar-benar bangga dengan pekerjaan mereka. Kamar kami sangat bersih, dan semua fasilitas—dari pusat kebugaran hingga area kolam renang hingga ruang makan—bersih, terawat dengan baik, dan menarik.

Dari tim resepsionis hingga petugas kebersihan, dari koki hingga staf ruang makan, semua orang profesional, ramah, dan penuh perhatian. Konsistensi seperti itulah yang membuat saya percaya untuk menginap di sini. Sarapannya luar biasa, dan salsa buatan sendiri itu… dengarkan, itu saja sudah sangat berarti! Saya hampir tidak ingin menulis ulasan ini karena saya ingin menyimpan permata ini untuk diri saya sendiri.

Lokasinya juga merupakan nilai tambah yang besar—dekat dengan bandara, dekat dengan pusat perbelanjaan yang bagus, dan dalam jarak berjalan kaki dari restoran-restoran hebat seperti BJ's dan Lucille's. Kami sudah menantikan kunjungan kami berikutnya.

Selalu terkesan dengan merek Hotel Ayres. Mereka jelas memperlakukan karyawan mereka dengan baik, dan itu terlihat dari kualitas layanan dan pengalaman secara keseluruhan.

name: Teresa Dahlberg
text: The room was great. I loved how the patio and pool was right there.   The breakfast was bland. But the thing that made me really upset is the air conditioning stopped working the next morning while we were getting ready for a funeral.  I called the front desk and the front desk attendant quickly responded by coming to our room.   She was surprised at how hot it was in the room.   We had the thermostat set to 62 degrees and it was 77 degrees.  She offered to have maintenance come look at it, but it was only 7:30 and they don’t get in until 8. She offered to have us get ready in another room. But that would have been a big deal. So we opted to stay and tough it out.  Upon check out the manager did give us a 10% discount.  I feel that was inadequate considering it was almost 80 degrees in our room.
textTranslated: Kamarnya bagus. Saya suka karena teras dan kolam renangnya berada tepat di depan kamar. Sarapannya hambar. Tapi yang benar-benar membuat saya kesal adalah AC berhenti berfungsi keesokan paginya saat kami bersiap-siap untuk pemakaman. Saya menelepon resepsionis dan petugas resepsionis segera datang ke kamar kami. Dia terkejut betapa panasnya ruangan itu. Kami menyetel termostat ke 62 derajat dan suhunya mencapai 77 derajat. Dia menawarkan untuk meminta petugas perawatan datang memeriksa, tetapi saat itu baru pukul 7:30 dan mereka baru masuk pukul 8. Dia menawarkan agar kami bersiap-siap di kamar lain. Tapi itu akan menjadi masalah besar. Jadi kami memilih untuk tetap tinggal dan bertahan. Saat check-out, manajer memberi kami diskon 10%. Saya merasa itu tidak cukup mengingat suhu di kamar kami hampir 80 derajat.

title: Ayres Hotel Chino Hills - Ontario

name: Jay
text: Professional welcoming staff for check-in/out. Spacious lot with plenty of complimentary parking. Clean rooms. Bathroom as mentioned before, are extremely slippery and potentially dangerous. I slipped twice. Rooms are not soundproof and you will hear other guests or housekeeping. Breakfast is continental but Ayres Hotels have a great mix for waffles. They have items for purchase as a scan, pay and go with higher prices compared to other hotels. Our last day, we didn’t realize breakfast hours were over but the lady making burritos was patient and still made our burritos. We always opt to stay at Ayres Hotels when visiting Southern California. The staff goes above and beyond, everything feels safe and their breakfast is superior compared to similar hotels. Their only flaw is safety (slippery shower). Plenty of restaurants within driving distance.
textTranslated: Staf penyambut yang profesional untuk proses check-in/check-out. Area parkir luas dengan banyak tempat parkir gratis. Kamar bersih. Kamar mandi, seperti yang disebutkan sebelumnya, sangat licin dan berpotensi berbahaya. Saya terpeleset dua kali. Kamar tidak kedap suara dan Anda akan mendengar tamu lain atau petugas kebersihan. Sarapan kontinental, tetapi Ayres Hotels memiliki pilihan waffle yang beragam. Mereka memiliki beberapa item yang dapat dibeli dengan sistem pindai, bayar, dan langsung pergi dengan harga lebih tinggi dibandingkan hotel lain. Pada hari terakhir kami, kami tidak menyadari jam sarapan sudah berakhir, tetapi wanita yang membuat burrito tetap sabar dan membuatkan burrito untuk kami. Kami selalu memilih untuk menginap di Ayres Hotels saat mengunjungi California Selatan. Stafnya sangat ramah, semuanya terasa aman, dan sarapan mereka lebih unggul dibandingkan hotel sejenis. Satu-satunya kekurangan mereka adalah masalah keamanan (kamar mandi licin). Banyak restoran yang dapat dijangkau dengan berkendara.

name: Karoline
text:
Nous avons eu une excellente expérience au Grand Pacific Hotel de Victoria, du début à la fin. Dès notre arrivée, le personnel était présent pour ouvrir les portes et s’occuper des bagages, ce qui donne immédiatement le ton à un séjour de qualité.

L’enregistrement a été simple et efficace, et le hall d’entrée est magnifique. L’hôtel dispose de plusieurs ascenseurs, ce qui évite les longues attentes et l’impression d’être constamment entouré de monde.

Notre suite était spacieuse, très propre et baignée de lumière naturelle, avec une belle vue sur le centre-ville. Les chambres sont bien décorées et les espaces communs sont impeccablement entretenus. Nous avions également deux salles de bain, ce qui était très pratique.

Le lit est étonnamment ferme, mais nous y avons dormi merveilleusement bien. C’est le genre de lit qui semble dur au premier abord, mais qui procure un excellent sommeil.

Les installations sont également un grand atout : piscine, sauna et salle d’entraînement, parfaits pour les familles et les voyageurs qui souhaitent profiter de leur séjour.

Au moment du départ, le service est demeuré tout aussi impeccable. Le personnel nous a aidés avec les bagages et a organisé notre taxi sans aucun souci.

Je recommande cet établissement sans hésitation. Un hôtel élégant, confortable, bien situé et très bien géré, offrant un service attentionné du début à la fin.
textTranslated:
Kami memiliki pengalaman yang luar biasa di Grand Pacific Hotel di Victoria dari awal hingga akhir. Sejak saat kami tiba, staf sudah siap membukakan pintu dan mengurus barang bawaan kami, yang langsung memberikan kesan bahwa kami akan mendapatkan pengalaman menginap yang berkualitas.

Proses check-in sederhana dan efisien, dan lobi hotel sangat indah. Hotel ini memiliki beberapa lift, yang menghindari antrean panjang dan perasaan selalu dikelilingi oleh orang banyak.

Suite kami luas, sangat bersih, dan dipenuhi cahaya alami, dengan pemandangan pusat kota yang indah. Kamar-kamar didekorasi dengan baik, dan area umum terawat dengan sempurna. Kami juga memiliki dua kamar mandi, yang sangat nyaman.

Kasurnya agak keras, tetapi kami tidur nyenyak. Ini adalah jenis kasur yang terasa keras pada awalnya tetapi memberikan tidur yang nyenyak.

Fasilitasnya juga merupakan nilai tambah yang besar: kolam renang, sauna, dan pusat kebugaran, sangat cocok untuk keluarga dan wisatawan yang ingin memaksimalkan masa menginap mereka.

Saat keberangkatan, layanan tetap sempurna. Staf membantu kami dengan barang bawaan dan mengatur taksi kami tanpa kesulitan.

Saya merekomendasikan hotel ini tanpa ragu-ragu. Hotel yang elegan, nyaman, berlokasi strategis, dan dikelola dengan sangat baik, menawarkan pelayanan yang penuh perhatian dari awal hingga akhir.
address: 463 Belleville St. #3, Victoria, BC V8V 1X3, Kanada
title: Hotel Grand Pacific

name: Mr L
text:
Our three-night stay was exceptional from beginning to end. What stood out most was the staff—every interaction was warm, professional, and welcoming, from check-in to check-out, housekeeping, the restaurant, and the lounge.

A special thank you to Christian in the restaurant. His knowledge of the menu and thoughtful wine recommendations elevated our dining experience. His suggestion of a Gewürztraminer paired perfectly with the sablefish and demonstrated a genuine understanding of both the food and wine offerings.

The hotel was impeccably clean, our room was comfortable with stunning views, and every member of the team seemed committed to creating a memorable guest experience. While we would have appreciated the late check-out we had requested, this was a minor inconvenience in an otherwise outstanding stay.

It is rare to leave a hotel struggling to find areas for improvement, and that speaks volumes about the quality of the experience. We look forward to returning and would happily recommend the hotel to others.
textTranslated:
Penginapan kami selama tiga malam sangat luar biasa dari awal hingga akhir. Yang paling menonjol adalah stafnya—setiap interaksi terasa hangat, profesional, dan ramah, mulai dari check-in hingga check-out, layanan kebersihan, restoran, dan lounge.

Terima kasih khusus kepada Christian di restoran. Pengetahuannya tentang menu dan rekomendasi anggur yang bijaksana meningkatkan pengalaman bersantap kami. Sarannya tentang Gewürztraminer sangat cocok dengan ikan sablefish dan menunjukkan pemahaman yang tulus tentang penawaran makanan dan anggur.

Hotel ini sangat bersih, kamar kami nyaman dengan pemandangan yang menakjubkan, dan setiap anggota tim tampak berkomitmen untuk menciptakan pengalaman tamu yang tak terlupakan. Meskipun kami akan menghargai check-out terlambat yang telah kami minta, ini hanyalah ketidaknyamanan kecil dalam pengalaman menginap yang luar biasa.

Jarang sekali meninggalkan hotel dengan kesulitan menemukan area yang perlu ditingkatkan, dan itu menunjukkan kualitas pengalaman yang luar biasa. Kami berharap dapat kembali dan dengan senang hati akan merekomendasikan hotel ini kepada orang lain.

text: I stayed two nights here. Room with two beds. In my room, there was an extra sink outside of the main washroom, which was actually pretty convenient for the other person. name: Nikita Vinnykov
text:
So, finally I saw the Hotel which looks like real Hotel: Beautifully lobby, friendly and hospitality staff and massive lobby. Front desk team works excellent and seamless. The atmosphere for arriving/departure guests comfortable with a lot of waiting areas.
I was really surprised that hotel doesn't have breakfast buffet, especially with that price range. Room dining options for breakfast available, but pretty pricey with disgusting delivery fees and mandatory gratuity.

You can get awesome view from the balcony to the Harbour, that's cool.

The room itself is very old and with many minor ugly details. Management need to plan the room upgrade to meet the guests expectations. Daily housekeeping was excellent and well done. The kettle for heat the water for the tea with a short cord and there is no reasonable table where you can power connect it. So, be ready to boil the water on the floor🤦

But some of the areas in room seems like have cleaning ones per season.
textTranslated:
Akhirnya, saya melihat hotel yang benar-benar terlihat seperti hotel sungguhan: lobi yang indah, staf yang ramah dan bersahabat, serta lobi yang luas. Tim resepsionis bekerja dengan sangat baik dan lancar. Suasana untuk tamu yang datang/berangkat nyaman dengan banyak area tunggu.

Anda bisa mendapatkan pemandangan pelabuhan yang menakjubkan dari balkon, itu keren.

Kamar itu sendiri sangat tua dan dengan banyak detail kecil yang jelek. Manajemen perlu merencanakan peningkatan kamar untuk memenuhi harapan tamu. Kebersihan harian sangat baik dan dilakukan dengan baik. Ketel untuk memanaskan air untuk teh memiliki kabel pendek dan tidak ada meja yang layak untuk menghubungkannya ke sumber listrik. Jadi, bersiaplah untuk merebus air di lantai 🤦

Namun, beberapa area di kamar tampaknya dibersihkan setiap musim.

name: Keni Vuki
text:
I have never stayed at the Grand Pacific Hotel, so I cannot comment on the accommodation side of things. However, I have attended numerous work-related events here over the years, including IT summits, vendor presentations, corporate functions, panel discussions, and networking events.

One thing that stands out is the versatility of the hotel's meeting and event spaces. GPH has six meeting and event rooms, and I have had the opportunity to visit all of them at one point or another. Each room seems to adapt well to the requirements of the organization hosting the event. The spaces are professional and well-presented, while still allowing organizers to customize and decorate them to suit the occasion.

The conference equipment is excellent. The audio systems, projectors, and presentation facilities have consistently performed well in every event I have attended. The Grand Britannia Ballroom in particular is impressive. During one of our company functions, it accommodated approximately 400 people comfortably, yet presentations remained clearly visible even from the back of the room. The screens were sharp, the sound was clear, and everything functioned reliably throughout the event. In all the years I have attended functions here, I cannot recall a single occasion where the equipment failed midway through a presentation.

The rooms are fully air-conditioned and can be quite cool, especially during longer sessions, so bringing a jacket is not a bad idea. Despite accommodating large crowds and technical equipment, the rooms still feel spacious enough to move around comfortably.

The staff deserve recognition for their professionalism and efficiency. Whether it is providing additional chairs, rearranging tables, or assisting guests with directions, they are approachable, helpful, and quick to respond. Their punctuality and attention to detail contribute greatly to the smooth running of events.

Another highlight is the catering. The functions I have attended have always featured buffet-style meals, and the menu has never felt repetitive. Every event seems to offer something different, which keeps the dining experience interesting. The food is kept warm throughout service, and the quality has been consistently good. The finger foods served during breaks also vary from event to event, and I have never had any complaints about them.

Finding your way around the venue is straightforward. Directional displays and event information kiosks make locating conference rooms easy, especially for first-time visitors. Even without the signage, staff members are readily available and willing to assist. The restrooms are exceptionally clean and well maintained, with essentials such as toilet paper and hand towels always stocked.

The hotel's architecture is another feature worth mentioning. Parts of the building reflect Fiji's colonial-era heritage, and it is clear that significant effort has gone into maintaining the property. The result is a venue that feels both historic and elegant. The surrounding views, including those overlooking Albert Park, further enhance the atmosphere.

Based on my experiences over the years, GPH handles events exceptionally well. Service standards remain consistent, even when hosting large crowds. The networking and breakout spaces are generous, creating a comfortable environment for professional interaction between sessions.

Overall, while I cannot review the hotel as a guest, I can confidently recommend Grand Pacific Hotel as a venue for IT summits, vendor showcases, conferences, corporate functions, and other professional events. It combines excellent facilities, reliable technology, professional staff, quality catering, and a unique historic setting that makes every event feel well organized and memorable.
textTranslated:
Saya belum pernah menginap di Grand Pacific Hotel, jadi saya tidak dapat berkomentar tentang sisi akomodasi. Namun, saya telah menghadiri banyak acara terkait pekerjaan di sini selama bertahun-tahun, termasuk pertemuan puncak IT, presentasi vendor, acara perusahaan, diskusi panel, dan acara networking.

Satu hal yang menonjol adalah fleksibilitas ruang pertemuan dan acara hotel. GPH memiliki enam ruang pertemuan dan acara, dan saya telah berkesempatan mengunjungi semuanya pada satu waktu atau lainnya. Setiap ruangan tampaknya beradaptasi dengan baik dengan kebutuhan organisasi yang menyelenggarakan acara tersebut. Ruangannya profesional dan tertata dengan baik, namun tetap memungkinkan penyelenggara untuk menyesuaikan dan mendekorasinya sesuai dengan acara tersebut.

Peralatan konferensi sangat baik. Sistem audio, proyektor, dan fasilitas presentasi secara konsisten berkinerja baik di setiap acara yang saya hadiri. Grand Britannia Ballroom khususnya sangat mengesankan. Selama salah satu acara perusahaan kami, ruangan tersebut dapat menampung sekitar 400 orang dengan nyaman, namun presentasi tetap terlihat jelas bahkan dari bagian belakang ruangan. Layarnya tajam, suaranya jernih, dan semuanya berfungsi dengan andal sepanjang acara. Selama bertahun-tahun saya menghadiri acara di sini, saya tidak ingat satu pun kejadian di mana peralatan mengalami kerusakan di tengah presentasi.

Ruangan-ruangan ber-AC penuh dan bisa cukup dingin, terutama selama sesi yang lebih panjang, jadi membawa jaket bukanlah ide yang buruk. Meskipun menampung banyak orang dan peralatan teknis, ruangan-ruangan tersebut tetap terasa cukup luas untuk bergerak dengan nyaman.

Staf layak mendapat pujian atas profesionalisme dan efisiensi mereka. Baik itu menyediakan kursi tambahan, menata ulang meja, atau membantu tamu dengan petunjuk arah, mereka mudah didekati, membantu, dan cepat tanggap. Ketepatan waktu dan perhatian mereka terhadap detail sangat berkontribusi pada kelancaran acara.

Sorotan lainnya adalah katering. Acara-acara yang saya hadiri selalu menampilkan makanan bergaya prasmanan, dan menunya tidak pernah terasa monoton. Setiap acara tampaknya menawarkan sesuatu yang berbeda, yang membuat pengalaman bersantap tetap menarik. Makanan tetap hangat selama penyajian, dan kualitasnya selalu baik. Makanan ringan yang disajikan selama istirahat juga bervariasi dari acara ke acara, dan saya tidak pernah memiliki keluhan tentangnya.

Menemukan jalan di sekitar tempat acara sangat mudah. Papan petunjuk arah dan kios informasi acara memudahkan pencarian ruang konferensi, terutama bagi pengunjung yang baru pertama kali datang. Bahkan tanpa papan petunjuk, staf selalu siap membantu. Kamar mandi sangat bersih dan terawat dengan baik, dengan perlengkapan penting seperti tisu toilet dan handuk selalu tersedia.

Arsitektur hotel adalah fitur lain yang patut disebutkan. Sebagian bangunan mencerminkan warisan era kolonial Fiji, dan jelas bahwa upaya signifikan telah dilakukan untuk memelihara properti ini. Hasilnya adalah tempat yang terasa bersejarah dan elegan. Pemandangan di sekitarnya, termasuk yang menghadap Taman Albert, semakin meningkatkan suasana.

Berdasarkan pengalaman saya selama bertahun-tahun, GPH menangani acara dengan sangat baik. Standar layanan tetap konsisten, bahkan saat menjamu banyak orang. Ruang networking dan breakout cukup luas, menciptakan lingkungan yang nyaman untuk interaksi profesional antar sesi.

Secara keseluruhan, meskipun saya tidak dapat memberikan ulasan hotel sebagai tamu, saya dapat dengan yakin merekomendasikan Grand Pacific Hotel sebagai tempat untuk pertemuan puncak IT, pameran vendor, konferensi, acara perusahaan, dan acara profesional lainnya. Tempat ini menggabungkan fasilitas yang sangat baik, teknologi yang andal, staf profesional, katering berkualitas, dan latar sejarah yang unik yang membuat setiap acara terasa terorganisir dengan baik dan berkesan.

textTranslated:
Semoga semuanya baik-baik saja dengan Anda, saya baik-baik saja di sini dan kembali ke Barat setelah hari Jumat yang indah di Suva {29 Mei hingga 31 Mei 2026} menginap di Grand Pacific Hotel, Suva.

Percayalah, saya tidak memberikan pujian kepada siapa pun kecuali jika memberikan kesan seperti itu, yang telah dibuktikan oleh tim Anda dan tim Bapak Robert Clark.

Saya ingin mengucapkan terima kasih dan mengapresiasi Tania Danford dari Reservasi dan Kara karena mereka selalu siap membantu kapan saja, dan juga atas kemudahan pembayaran yang luar biasa (Pay link). Menantikan acara penutupan Hibiscus di Albert Park dan menginap di Grand Pacific Hotel, Suva.
Terima kasih kepada staf lobi, Andrew Krishna, Darhan, Unaisi, dan Malakai karena telah menyambut kami, dan mengenali kami sebagai salah satu Anggota Platinum Elite, menjaga barang bawaan kami dengan aman sampai kamar siap. Terima kasih semuanya. Vinaka Lora dan Andrew Krishna beserta manajer tugas lainnya yang menghargai tamu dan melakukan 100%.

Terima kasih, para Chef, dan para Manajer Tugas F&B Elizebeth Bow, Meri {staf yang menyajikan makanan kami} atas layanan pelanggan yang sangat baik, tidak lupa juga Manoa, Verei, DM Jane, Kirti Chand dari pihak ICF yang mengurus keluarga kecil saya, dan semua orang yang bertugas.
Terima kasih

name: Dr. Vishneel Goundar
text:
A generally nice place. Definitely worth a good stay in Suva.

Rooms and it's amenities are decent however soap bars would also be appreciated!

Breakfast is amazing however the breakfast staff could be smilier and nicer!

Other wait staff and hotel staff who served us during our conference lunch and cocktails etc were absolutely awesome and superb!

Food is generally good and there is a decent amount of parking but sometimes hotel customers may find it difficult to find parking on-site as day visitors take up some spaces too.

Well equipped rooms however the ACs do kind of feel warm and slow at night despite the change in settings.

TV entertainment and other services are good. Great harbour view and it's a place I'd stay at again, if the prices are reasonable.
textTranslated:
Secara umum tempat yang bagus. Sangat layak untuk menginap di Suva.

Kamar dan fasilitasnya cukup baik, namun sabun batangan juga akan sangat dihargai!

Sarapannya luar biasa, namun staf sarapan bisa lebih ramah dan menyenangkan!

Staf pelayan dan staf hotel lainnya yang melayani kami selama makan siang konferensi dan koktail, dll., benar-benar luar biasa dan hebat!

Makanan umumnya enak dan ada cukup banyak tempat parkir, tetapi terkadang pelanggan hotel mungkin kesulitan menemukan tempat parkir di lokasi karena pengunjung harian juga mengambil beberapa tempat.

Kamar dilengkapi dengan baik, namun AC terasa agak hangat dan lambat di malam hari meskipun pengaturan sudah diubah.

Hiburan TV dan layanan lainnya bagus. Pemandangan pelabuhan yang indah dan ini adalah tempat yang akan saya tinggali lagi, jika harganya wajar.
responseFromOwnerText:
Dear Vishneel Goundar,

Thank you for taking the time to share such detailed feedback about your stay. We’re delighted to hear you enjoyed the Harbour views, breakfast selection, food quality, entertainment options and the overall comfort of our well equipped rooms. It’s especially wonderful to know our conference and events team made such a positive impression with their excellent services.

We also truly appreciate your constructive comments regarding the breakfast service, parking availability, room air conditioning and the additional of soap bars.

Thank you again  and we look forward to welcoming you in g you back.


Vinaka 
Maria

name: Mereseini Matatolu
text: My family and I had an enjoyable stay although only for 1 night. My kids loved the pool. Room was nice. We requested a rollaway bed for an additional guest and this was facilitated. Breakfast the next morning was lovely. Plan to stay again soon.
textTranslated: Saya dan keluarga menikmati masa menginap yang menyenangkan meskipun hanya 1 malam. Anak-anak saya sangat menyukai kolam renang. Kamarnya bagus. Kami meminta tempat tidur lipat untuk tamu tambahan dan permintaan ini dipenuhi. Sarapan keesokan paginya sangat enak. Berencana untuk menginap lagi segera.
responseFromOwnerText:
Dear Mereseini,

Thank you so much for your wonderful review. We’re delighted to hear that you and your family enjoyed your stay. We’re also pleased we could assist with the rollaway bed request and that you enjoyed breakfast the next morning. Your kind feedback means a lot to our team.

We hope to see you back soon.

Vinaka 
Maria
address: 584, 628 Victoria Parade, Suva, Fiji
title: Grand Pacific Hotel

name: RoseRae160P
text: The quality of food was good but best of all was the personal approach of the staff. Reception especially were extremely helpful - nothing was too much trouble and they went out of their way when I had difficulties with my travel card. I would highly recommend this hotel, especially older couples.
textTranslated: Kualitas makanannya bagus, tetapi yang terbaik dari semuanya adalah keramahan staf. Terutama bagian resepsionis sangat membantu - tidak ada yang merepotkan dan mereka berusaha keras membantu ketika saya mengalami kesulitan dengan kartu perjalanan saya. Saya sangat merekomendasikan hotel ini, terutama untuk pasangan yang lebih tua.
address: 584, 628 Victoria Parade, Suva, Fiji
title: Grand Pacific Hotel

name: Kasey L. Tan
text: Met some of the nicest staff at GPH, special thanks to Mere, Wendy and Shakira and many others who took great care of me during my week long stay there!
textTranslated: Bertemu dengan beberapa staf terbaik di GPH, terima kasih khusus kepada Mere, Wendy, dan Shakira serta banyak lainnya yang merawat saya dengan sangat baik selama seminggu saya berada di sana!
responseFromOwnerText:
Dear Kasey,

Thank you so much for your lovely feedback l. We’re thrilled to hear that you had such a positive experience during your week long stay with us.

Mere, Wendy, Shakira and the rest of the team will be delighted to know they made your stay extra special with their care and hospitality. We truly appreciate your kind words and will be sure to pass them along.

It was a pleasure having you with us.

Vinaka 
Maria

name: Anna Whelan
text: What an amazing stay with lovely caring staff and beautiful location. Facilities were of high standard and immaculate. Room was clean with nice balcony and view. The early bird rate was great value. Highly recommend
textTranslated: Pengalaman menginap yang luar biasa dengan staf yang ramah dan penuh perhatian serta lokasi yang indah. Fasilitasnya berstandar tinggi dan sangat bersih. Kamar bersih dengan balkon dan pemandangan yang bagus. Tarif pemesanan awal sangat menguntungkan. Sangat direkomendasikan.
responseFromOwnerText:
Dear Anna,

Thank you so much for your wonderful review and recommendation. We’re delighted to hear that you had an amazing stay and enjoyed our beautiful location, well maintained facilities and the comfort your room and balcony.

Vinaka
Maria

title: Grand Pacific Hotel

name: Lisa Maher
text: A beautiful historic hotel located on the harbour with everything you would expect from a modern five star hotel. However, what makes GPH really special is the Fijian warmth extended by the staff. Every stay is like coming home.
textTranslated: Hotel bersejarah yang indah ini terletak di pelabuhan dan memiliki semua fasilitas yang Anda harapkan dari hotel bintang lima modern. Namun, yang membuat GPH benar-benar istimewa adalah kehangatan khas Fiji yang diberikan oleh para stafnya. Setiap kunjungan terasa seperti pulang ke rumah.
responseFromOwnerText:
Dear Lisa,

Thank you sincerely for your beautiful review and for your continued support of the Grand Pacific Hotel. We’re honored by your kind words about our historic hotel, harbor location and modern facilities.

What truly means the most to us is your recognition of the genuine Fijian warmth and hospitality extended by our team. Creating an experience where our guests feel welcomed, comfortable and at home is exactly what we strive for every day.

It is always a pleasure to have you stay with us, and we look forward to welcoming you home again soon.

Vinaka 
Maria

title: Grand Pacific Hotel

name: Trip.com Member
text: It is a very terrible experience there.Staff are not favorably they asked for extra money as well and I paid too.I heard it Very nice, a five-star hotel, but I would never recommend it to anyone. All the stuff is very old and sounds coming out when open and closes.I never experienced.
textTranslated: Pengalaman di sana sangat mengerikan. Stafnya tidak ramah, mereka juga meminta uang tambahan dan saya pun membayarnya. Saya mendengar hotel itu sangat bagus, hotel bintang lima, tetapi saya tidak akan pernah merekomendasikannya kepada siapa pun. Semua barangnya sangat tua dan mengeluarkan suara saat dibuka dan ditutup. Saya belum pernah mengalami hal seperti itu.
address: 584, 628 Victoria Parade, Suva, Fiji
title: Grand Pacific Hotel

name: Trip.com Member
text: The Grand Pacific is a splendid historical building in the center of Suva, right on the sea front. Facilities are very good and the rooms are comfortable and clean. However, the building shows it's age and a lot of the hallways (and my room) felt damp. We are near the ocean so that may be unavoidable. Service was overall ok, except at the bar where they consistently refused to honor the "happy hour" advertised by their colleagues at the front desk. Not a huge deal, but this is not the best way to treat hotel guests.
textTranslated: Grand Pacific adalah bangunan bersejarah yang megah di pusat Suva, tepat di tepi laut. Fasilitasnya sangat baik dan kamar-kamarnya nyaman dan bersih. Namun, bangunan tersebut menunjukkan usianya dan banyak lorong (dan kamar saya) terasa lembap. Kami berada dekat laut sehingga hal itu mungkin tidak dapat dihindari. Pelayanan secara keseluruhan cukup baik, kecuali di bar tempat mereka secara konsisten menolak untuk menghormati "happy hour" yang diiklankan oleh rekan-rekan mereka di meja depan. Bukan masalah besar, tetapi ini bukan cara terbaik untuk memperlakukan tamu hotel.
address: 584, 628 Victoria Parade, Suva, Fiji
title: Grand Pacific Hotel

name: Zubair Hasan
text:
Excellent city hotel. If you're on business in Suva but want some of the perks of the resorts outside Suva then GPH is your only option. Will definitely love to stay again. Staff are all beautiful people and very helpful.

What I would love to see is more options for tours from the hotel for my next stay.
textTranslated:
Hotel kota yang luar biasa. Jika Anda sedang dalam perjalanan bisnis di Suva tetapi menginginkan beberapa fasilitas resor di luar Suva, maka GPH adalah satu-satunya pilihan Anda. Saya pasti ingin menginap di sini lagi. Semua stafnya ramah dan sangat membantu.

Yang ingin saya lihat adalah lebih banyak pilihan tur dari hotel untuk kunjungan saya berikutnya.
responseFromOwnerText:
Dear Zubair,

We truly appreciate your kind feedback and have shared this with our team.

Also we have taken note of your comments regarding more options for tours and we will surely provide you more options when you do return.

Looking forward to seeing you again soon.

Vinaka 
Maria
address: 584, 628 Victoria Parade, Suva, Fiji
title: Grand Pacific Hotel

name: 397josephb
text: Bula,|My wife and I chose the Grand Pacific Hotel to celebrate our 30th anniversary, hoping for an experience comparable to the Westin Moana Surfrider or other high-end plantation-style lodgings we’ve enjoyed in the past. Unfortunately, this stay was a major letdown.|Room Condition & Cleanliness|The room was simply not up to standard. It felt dirty, and we even woke up with pieces of scotch tape stuck to our bodies from the bedding. As shown in the attached photos, the patio screen was torn and the furniture showed noticeable wear. We did not get a good night's rest here.|Service & Dining|Breakfast was another low point. We ordered coffee twice and it never arrived, so we eventually had to get up and make our own. The service was significantly lacking for a hotel of this caliber.|Departure|Because of our experience, we contacted Toberua Island directly to arrange an early pickup at 10:30 AM so we could depart this property.|Final Thoughts|For a property with this reputation, the lack of maintenance and basic service is unacceptable—especially for such a special occasion. We were looking forward to this stay, but we will not be returning.|— Joe & Laure Bemis|Note: I have attached photos documenting the dust under the bed, damaged furniture, stains on the nightstand, and marks on the linens.
textTranslated: Bula,|Saya dan istri saya memilih Grand Pacific Hotel untuk merayakan ulang tahun pernikahan kami yang ke-30, berharap mendapatkan pengalaman yang sebanding dengan Westin Moana Surfrider atau penginapan bergaya perkebunan kelas atas lainnya yang pernah kami nikmati di masa lalu. Sayangnya, pengalaman menginap ini sangat mengecewakan.|Kondisi & Kebersihan Kamar|Kamar tersebut sama sekali tidak sesuai standar. Terasa kotor, dan kami bahkan terbangun dengan potongan selotip yang menempel di tubuh kami dari seprai. Seperti yang terlihat pada foto terlampir, tirai teras robek dan perabotannya menunjukkan keausan yang terlihat jelas. Kami tidak bisa tidur nyenyak di sini.|Pelayanan & Makan|Sarapan juga merupakan poin yang mengecewakan. Kami memesan kopi dua kali dan kopi tersebut tidak pernah datang, jadi akhirnya kami harus bangun dan membuat kopi sendiri. Pelayanan sangat kurang untuk hotel sekelas ini.|Keberangkatan|Karena pengalaman kami, kami menghubungi Toberua Island secara langsung untuk mengatur penjemputan lebih awal pukul 10:30 pagi agar kami dapat meninggalkan properti ini.|Kesimpulan|Untuk properti dengan reputasi seperti ini, kurangnya perawatan dan layanan dasar tidak dapat diterima—terutama untuk acara istimewa seperti ini. Kami sangat menantikan menginap di sini, tetapi kami tidak akan kembali.|— Joe & Laure Bemis|Catatan: Saya telah melampirkan foto-foto yang mendokumentasikan debu di bawah tempat tidur, furnitur yang rusak, noda di meja samping tempat tidur, dan bekas pada linen.
address: 584, 628 Victoria Parade, Suva, Fiji
title: Grand Pacific Hotel

name: M J
text:
We stayed in the heritage part of the hotel and had a lovely suite facing the Albert park. It was a cosy suite with lot of history. Loved sitting on the balcony most days and watching the hum drum in the park.
Gin and tea of the hotel is truly legendary!!
Location is perfect. Albert park on one side of the hotel and the sea on the other. Beautiful!!
Really enjoyed the kindness and attentiveness of some of the staff. We were well looked after.

Would love to return again and enjoy the hotel.
Would like to thank Joy for her masterful cooking. Vani and Rozie for their smiling service.
Great housekeeping team. And very helpful front desk. It all won’t have been possible without Robert’s management and his all round wonderful staff.

Vinaka everyone.
textTranslated:
Kami menginap di bagian hotel yang bersejarah dan memiliki suite yang indah menghadap Taman Albert. Suite itu nyaman dan penuh sejarah. Kami senang duduk di balkon hampir setiap hari dan menyaksikan hiruk pikuk di taman.
Gin dan teh di hotel ini benar-benar legendaris!!
Lokasinya sempurna. Taman Albert di satu sisi hotel dan laut di sisi lainnya. Indah!!
Kami sangat menikmati kebaikan dan perhatian dari beberapa staf. Kami dilayani dengan baik.

Kami ingin kembali lagi dan menikmati hotel ini.
Kami ingin mengucapkan terima kasih kepada Joy atas masakannya yang luar biasa. Vani dan Rozie atas pelayanan mereka yang ramah.
Tim housekeeping yang hebat. Dan resepsionis yang sangat membantu. Semua ini tidak akan mungkin terjadi tanpa manajemen Robert dan stafnya yang luar biasa.

Vinaka semuanya.
responseFromOwnerText:
Dear MJ,

Vinaka Vakalevu for your kind feedback.

We will definitely give Vani and Rozie the recognition they deserve.

We hope to see you back soon!

Vinaka 
Maria

name: DocTP74
text: Stayed there for 3 days, and I have to say, the customer service was professional, and the hotel itself was amazing. It was clean and very modern for someone who has visited a few hotels around the Pacific. Highly recommended
textTranslated: Saya menginap di sana selama 3 hari, dan harus saya akui, layanan pelanggannya profesional, dan hotelnya sendiri luar biasa. Hotelnya bersih dan sangat modern bagi seseorang yang telah mengunjungi beberapa hotel di sekitar Pasifik. Sangat direkomendasikan.
address: 584, 628 Victoria Parade, Suva, Fiji
title: Grand Pacific Hotel

name: Christina Rupp
text:
Incredibly good service from staff who made you feel like you’d known them a long time. And were genuinely interested in how our visit was going. During the visit and at the end.
A beautiful hotel on the water, a people watching spot and the most amazing breakfast included with our stay.
I could go on but you should really find out for yourself if you get to Suva 😊
textTranslated:
Pelayanan yang luar biasa baik dari staf yang membuat Anda merasa seperti sudah mengenal mereka sejak lama. Dan mereka benar-benar tertarik dengan bagaimana kunjungan kami berjalan. Selama kunjungan dan di akhir kunjungan.
Hotel yang indah di tepi laut, tempat untuk mengamati orang dan sarapan paling menakjubkan yang termasuk dalam masa inap kami.
Saya bisa terus bercerita, tetapi Anda benar-benar harus mencobanya sendiri jika Anda berkunjung ke Suva 😊
responseFromOwnerText:
Dear Christina,

Thank you so much for your wonderful review. We’re truly delighted to hear that our team made you feel so welcome and well cared for throughout your stay. Creating genuine connections with our guest is something we take great pride in so your comments mean a lot. 

It’s fantastic to know you enjoyed our waterfront setting, the relaxed atmosphere and of course the breakfast we’re glad it was a highlight of your visit.

We sincerely appreciate your recommendation and kind words. We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back again soon for another memorable stay.

Vinaka 
Maria

name: Thomas Neavill
text: Nice modern hotel with clean and comfortable rooms. We arrived early as part of a group because I needed an accessible room with a walk in shower. Daisy at the front desk searched and found us a room that was already available and let us check in early. She is definitely a valuable asset to your business as she knows how to care for her customers. Also, everyone else we saw was very pleasant and polite too. I would absolutely recommend staying here if you need a room in the area.
textTranslated: Hotel modern yang bagus dengan kamar-kamar yang bersih dan nyaman. Kami tiba lebih awal sebagai bagian dari rombongan karena saya membutuhkan kamar yang mudah diakses dengan kamar mandi tanpa sekat. Daisy di resepsionis mencari dan menemukan kamar yang sudah tersedia untuk kami dan mengizinkan kami check-in lebih awal. Dia benar-benar aset berharga bagi bisnis Anda karena dia tahu bagaimana melayani pelanggannya dengan baik. Selain itu, semua orang lain yang kami temui juga sangat ramah dan sopan. Saya sangat merekomendasikan untuk menginap di sini jika Anda membutuhkan kamar di daerah ini.
responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for your wonderful review. We’re delighted to hear that you enjoyed our modern facilities and found your room clean and comfortable.
It’s especially great to know that Daisy was able to assist you with securing an accessible room and arranging an early check-in. We agree—she truly is a valuable asset to our team, and we will be sure to recognize her for the exceptional care she provided.
We’re also pleased that our entire team made a positive impression during your stay. Providing warm, attentive service is something we take great pride in.
Thank you for recommending us—it means a great deal. We look forward to welcoming you back the next time you’re in the area!

name: Carrie Class
text: The worst hotel stay of my life. There is something very wrong here. It’s a scary place for a single woman traveling alone.
textTranslated: Pengalaman menginap di hotel terburuk dalam hidupku. Ada sesuatu yang sangat salah di sini. Ini tempat yang menakutkan bagi seorang wanita yang bepergian sendirian.
responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you for sharing your feedback.  It’s unfortunate to read that you felt uncomfortable during your stay. The safety and well-being of all our guests is always our highest priority, and we take statements regarding guest security very seriously.
At the same time, during your visit, our Assistant General manager received a complaint from another guest regarding a negative interaction with you that was described as racial harassment. Our manager addressed the situation promptly to ensure a comfortable environment for everyone involved.  We do not tolerate any belligerent behavior that undermines other guests’ comfort and safety.  We strive to maintain a respectful and welcoming atmosphere for all guests, and that includes addressing concerns on all sides when they arise.
We regret that your overall experience did not meet your expectations. If there are specific details you would like to share about what made you feel unsafe, we would welcome the opportunity to review them further.

name: Thomas Parker
text:
Omar at the front desk was amazing. He went above and beyond when I was checking in late,  and made sure I was taken care of!

The hotel is new and looks new and modern. The couch in the room was pretty comfy actually (maybe because it's new).

There were two big TVs. The desk and chair were sleek and nice.

A lot of free parking as the hotel sits at the end of a cul-de-sac, kinda.
textTranslated:
Omar di resepsionis sangat luar biasa. Dia melakukan lebih dari yang diharapkan ketika saya check-in terlambat, dan memastikan saya terlayani dengan baik!

Hotel ini baru dan terlihat baru serta modern. Sofa di kamar cukup nyaman (mungkin karena masih baru).

Terdapat dua TV besar. Meja dan kursinya ramping dan bagus.

Tersedia banyak tempat parkir gratis karena hotel terletak di ujung jalan buntu.
responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for taking the time to share your experience! We’re thrilled to hear that Omar made such a positive impression—he’ll be delighted to know his efforts helped make your late check-in smooth and comfortable.
We’re also glad you enjoyed the modern design, comfortable furnishings, spacious work area, and ample free parking. It’s great to know those details stood out during your stay.
We truly appreciate your feedback and hope to welcome you back again soon!

name: Victor Flint
text:
Room is filthy. First room they put me in didnt have a working TV and had the previous person's leftover food in the fridge (leaking and filled completely). They changed my room bc of the broken TV, but the floor in the new room seems like it hasn't been vacuumed in weeks; and when I left for work, my gf found the previous guests dirty socks tucked under the bed. The cleaning crew completely drops the ball here so I cant recommend this hotel.

However, front desk was very apologetic and made sure they did everything they could to make it up to us for the inconvenience.
textTranslated:
Kamarnya sangat kotor. Kamar pertama yang mereka berikan kepada saya tidak memiliki TV yang berfungsi dan terdapat sisa makanan tamu sebelumnya di kulkas (bocor dan penuh). Mereka mengganti kamar saya karena TV yang rusak, tetapi lantai di kamar baru tampaknya belum disedot debu selama berminggu-minggu; dan ketika saya berangkat kerja, pacar saya menemukan kaus kaki kotor tamu sebelumnya terselip di bawah tempat tidur. Tim kebersihan benar-benar lalai di sini sehingga saya tidak dapat merekomendasikan hotel ini.

Namun, resepsionis sangat meminta maaf dan memastikan mereka melakukan segala yang mereka bisa untuk mengganti ketidaknyamanan yang kami alami.
responseFromOwnerText:
We sincerely apologize for the unacceptable condition of your room and for the multiple issues you experienced during your stay. This is far below our cleanliness standards, and we fully understand your frustration. 

We regret that this experience impacted your ability to recommend our hotel. Your feedback is taken very seriously, and we appreciate you giving us the opportunity to address these shortcomings. I hope you will consider giving us another chance in the future to provide the clean, comfortable stay you should always expect from Marriott.
address: 14705 Ramona Ave, Chino, CA 91710
title: Fairfield by Marriott Inn & Suites Chino

name: Yuda Saputra
text:
(+) Kamar bersih dan wangi, kasur selimut bantal bersih dan wangi cuma sudah sedikit kusam, AC dingin, shower air panas berfungsi, suasana cukup tenang, wifi berfungsi walau kadang putus2, tersedia air dispenser dan dapur bersama, tersedia coffee shop tapi saya tidak mencoba. Lokasi dekat Mall botanica, beberapa toko oleh2, dan beberapa shuttle travel.
(-) tidak disediakan sabun, sampo, dan pasta gigi, TV tidak berfungsi (pas tanya staf katanya semua kamar sama), kalau tidak bawa kendaraan pilihan makanan di sekitar cuma ada tukang nasi goreng pas di depannya kalau mau yg lain harus jalan kaki cukup jauh sekitar 10-15 menit, minimarket jg jauh tapi ada warung kelontong di sekitar.

Over all penginapan ini cukup recommend sesuai harganya.
